text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tenno Sho! Spring! Hark, with what<n>majesty these
words toll!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This race I have long striven for is the<n>first
spectacular event of my senior<n>year. What could
be more fitting?
choice_data_list: Yeah, it carries a lot of influence.
Yeah, it carries a lot of influence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Influence... Yes, the one thing I do not<n>have at the
moment.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I lack influence. Even with myabilities, overlordly as they are, thereremain those reluctant to serve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I shall establish my brand and<n>acquire great
influence through a fine<n>victory in this legendary
race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once achieved, even the most<n>stubborn of the old
order believers<n>will have no choice but to admit
that I<n>am their new lord.
choice_data_list: You've got a lot on your plate, huh?
You've got a lot on your plate, huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but that is what makes being the<n>Overlord so
divine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
After this spring Tenno Sho, the<n>heroes of the
previous generation, as<n>well as Doto, will be
awaiting my<n>challenge.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But today, I have only one rival—that<n>unseen foe
by the name of<n>"influence"!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I, the soon-to-be Centurial Overlord,<n>will not falter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Observe, as I take the hand of those<n>stubborn old
fools in a marvelous<n>ensemble performance!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With dignified steps, T.M. Opera O<n>struts away
toward the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This distinguished race will test<n>whether she is a
true ruler or not.
